title: poa × nobilis
intro: Poa × nobilis, also known as meadow grass or sweet vernal grass, is a hybrid perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Its medicinal properties are derived from its leaves, flowers, and seeds, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Poa × nobilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
